title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Obtain the Community Collection
content:
Completing all the Weekly Challenges outlined below over the next three weeks will earn you rewards from some of Los Santos' most stylish brands with the Community Collection — consisting of the Homies Sharp Tee, Benny’s Fitted Cap, plus new Knuckleduster and Sessanta Nove Monogram liveries for the HVY Nightshark (Off-Road).

- March 12 – 18: Win three Races
- March 19 – 25: Win three Deathmatches
- March 26 – April 1: Win three Races
